entities.name: List System
entities.context: Health monitoring system for managing lists with status checks and thresholds

entities.name: Phase 3
entities.context: A threshold stage in the list system, recommended when list count exceeds certain limits

entities.name: List Count
entities.context: Metric tracking number of lists, with 15+ triggering warnings

entities.name: Status
entities.context: Health indicator with values like OK and WARNING

entities.name: Urgency
entities.context: Priority indicator with values like NONE and LOW

relationships.context: Phase 3 is a recommended action threshold within the list system
List count of 15+ approaches Phase 3 threshold
List system monitors list count as a health metric
List system uses status to indicate overall health
List system uses urgency to indicate action priority
